narrative:
Washington Township (precinct in Mercer County) has 822 registered voters, with 44.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 52.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 3.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 49.1 percentage points.
